//: Project settings for Claude Code. Checked into git so the whole team shares the same permissions and hooks. Personal overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored).

permissions.//: Allowlist the routine commands so the team is not prompted for them. Denylist the destructive ones outright.

hooks.//: After any file edit, format the file and run the type checker. Output comes back to the agent as feedback, so a type error gets fixed in the same turn.
Blocks shell commands that would rewrite rates.js without a test file present. A hard guardrail around the riskiest file in the repo.
